summary: Crisp shotgun audience recording captures an outstanding Grateful Dead performance.
review: The pull, recorded with Jim Vita’s CP4 shotgun mic, is described as very defined and crisp, delivering excellent audio clarity for a crowd‑sourced source. The reviewer also calls the show “great,” indicating strong musical performance despite no specific song details being mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Both the performance and the shotgun audience recording are praised highly, but only a single brief review limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Shotgun microphone yields clear, detailed sound with defined mids and highs; no major noise or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes the overall show as great.
